sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66569" key="mesw|diko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσῳδ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n66569.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεσῳδός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:4:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.4</biblScope></bibl>, cf. Sch. ad loc.</sense> </entryFree>
